result: Dashboard form allows property creation with fallback/pilot Kayseri > Melikgazi > Gesi Cumhuriyet data. All required fields are accepted, and property is created successfully. Redirected to property detail/source guidance page.
uiEvidence: Form accepts all required fields. Property created, redirected to documents page. Source guidance, upload, and manual check options are visible. No official verification claim, no fake full Kayseri coverage claim.
